---
title: package-directory-mismatch
description: "Match package and directory names."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Match package and directory names. Strider default: testdata ignored.

## Bad

```go
// storage/client.go
package store
```

## Good

```go
// store/client.go
package store
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only package-directory-mismatch`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `note`.
